pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your ambitions. Upgrade at your own pace.
pricing.faq_change_plan_q: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faq_change_plan_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. The change takes effect immediately, with prorated billing.
pricing.faq_payment_methods_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq_payment_methods_a: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, Orange Money, Wave, MTN Mobile Money and SEPA transfers.
pricing.faq_commitment_a: No, all our plans are commitment-free. You can cancel at any time. Annual billing offers a 25% discount.
pricing.faq_commission_a: Commission is taken from each successful sale. Discovery: 12%, Ascension: 5%, Summit: fixed €1 per sale, Empire: 0% — you keep everything!
pricing.faq_agency_members_q: Does the Empire plan include team management?
pricing.faq_agency_members_a: Yes, the Empire plan supports up to 25 team members with role management, built-in CRM, 100 GB shared cloud, and 0% commission.

how_it_works_page.title: How does it work?
how_it_works_page.subtitle: Novakou connects freelancers, clients and agencies securely.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step1_desc: Sign up, add your skills and portfolio.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step2_desc: Define your packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with prices and deadlines.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step3_desc: Clients order your services directly or invite you to their projects.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step4_desc: Funds are secured in escrow and released after delivery validation.
how_it_works_page.client_step1_desc: Browse the marketplace or post your project to receive applications.
how_it_works_page.client_step2_desc: Choose a package and place your order. Payment is secure.
how_it_works_page.client_step3_desc: Chat with your freelancer through the built-in messaging.
how_it_works_page.client_step4_desc: Validate the delivery and leave a review. Funds are released.
how_it_works_page.agency_step1_desc: Register your agency with a dedicated profile (logo, description, industry).
how_it_works_page.agency_step2_desc: Invite freelancers to join your agency with custom roles.
how_it_works_page.agency_step3_desc: Assign tasks, track progress and manage client CRM.
how_it_works_page.agency_step4_desc: Centralized finances, configurable internal commission, collective withdrawals.

trust_page.title: Trust & Security
trust_page.subtitle: Your security is our priority. Discover how Novakou protects every transaction.
trust_page.feature_escrow_desc: All transactions are protected by the escrow system. Funds are held until delivery is validated.
trust_page.feature_kyc_desc: 4 progressive verification levels (email, phone, identity, professional) to ensure reliability.
trust_page.feature_disputes_desc: Our team intervenes in case of a dispute to find a fair solution between the parties.
trust_page.feature_ssl_desc: All communications and data are encrypted with a bank-grade SSL certificate.
trust_page.feature_privacy_desc: Full GDPR compliance. Your personal data is securely stored in Europe.
trust_page.feature_escrow_guaranteed_desc: Funds are never in the hands of a single party. The escrow system protects both buyers and sellers.
trust_page.support_desc: Our support team is available to help you resolve any problem.

affiliation.hero_subtitle: Join our affiliate program and earn commissions on every transaction from your referrals. Simple, transparent and with no earnings limit.
affiliation.how_subtitle: Three simple steps to start earning commissions.
affiliation.step1_desc: Share your unique link with your friends and colleagues
affiliation.step2_desc: Your referrals create an account and start using the platform
affiliation.step3_desc: Receive a commission on every transaction from your referrals
affiliation.tiers_subtitle: The more you refer, the higher your commission rate. Climb the ranks and maximize your earnings.
affiliation.calc_subtitle: Move the sliders to estimate your monthly affiliate earnings.
affiliation.calc_estimate_note: Estimate based on {referrals} referrals with an average revenue of {avgRevenue} €/month and a commission rate of {commission}%.
affiliation.testimonials_subtitle: Discover testimonials from our most active affiliates.
affiliation.testimonial1_quote: Thanks to the program, I earn an extra €500/month. It's an incredible additional income.
affiliation.testimonial2_quote: I recommended Novakou to my developer colleagues and the commissions come in every month.
affiliation.testimonial3_quote: The affiliate program is transparent and reliable. Payments are always on time.
affiliation.faq1_a: Sign up for the affiliate program, share your unique link and earn a commission on every transaction generated by your referrals. The more you refer, the higher your commission rate.
affiliation.faq2_a: Commissions are paid automatically each month, on the 15th of the following month. You can choose to receive your earnings by SEPA transfer, PayPal, Wise or Mobile Money.
affiliation.faq3_a: The minimum withdrawal is €10. Once your balance reaches this threshold, you can request a transfer at any time or wait for the automatic monthly payment.
affiliation.faq4_a: Absolutely! You can refer freelancers, clients and agencies. Commissions on agency referrals are particularly attractive because their transaction volumes are higher.
affiliation.faq5_q: How do I track my referrals?
affiliation.faq5_a: You have a complete dashboard with the number of referrals, commissions earned, payment history and detailed statistics on your performance.
affiliation.cta_subtitle: Start earning commissions today. Free sign-up, monthly payments, no earnings limit.

help.hero_subtitle: Find answers to your questions, explore our guides or contact our support team.
help.article_create_account: How to create a Novakou account
help.article_publish_service: Publish your first service in 5 minutes
help.article_withdraw: How to withdraw your earnings (SEPA, Mobile Money)
help.article_dispute: What to do in case of a dispute with a client
help.article_track_orders: Track the progress of your orders
help.article_optimize_profile: Optimize your profile to attract more clients
help.faq_signup_q: How do I sign up on Novakou?
help.faq_signup_a: Signing up is free and takes just a few minutes. Go to the sign-up page, choose your role (Freelancer, Client or Agency), fill in your information and verify your email address via the OTP code we send you. You can also sign up with Google, LinkedIn, Facebook or Apple.
help.faq_payment_methods_a: Novakou accepts credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) via Stripe, Mobile Money payments (Orange Money, Wave, MTN MoMo) via CinetPay, PayPal, SEPA transfers, and stablecoins USDC/USDT. The default currency is Euro (EUR) with automatic conversion to FCFA, USD, GBP and MAD.
help.faq_delivery_a: Once the order is accepted, the freelancer works on the project and delivers files directly in the order space. The client receives a notification and has time to validate the delivery or request a revision. Funds are only released after validation.
help.faq_open_dispute_q: How do I open a dispute?
help.faq_open_dispute_a: If you are not satisfied with a delivery and cannot reach an agreement with the provider, you can open a dispute from the order detail page. A Novakou mediator will review the evidence provided by both parties and render a fair verdict.
help.faq_commissions_a: Commissions vary by subscription plan: Discovery (12%), Ascension at 15 EUR/month (5%), Summit at 29.99 EUR/month (1 EUR/sale), Empire at 65 EUR/month (0%). Each plan offers additional benefits such as advertising boosts, AI certifications and API keys.
help.faq_withdraw_q: How do I withdraw my earnings?
help.faq_withdraw_a: Go to the Earnings & Finances section of your dashboard. You can withdraw your funds via SEPA transfer (Europe), Mobile Money via Orange Money, Wave or MTN MoMo (Africa), PayPal, Wise, or crypto (USDC/USDT). Processing time varies from 1 to 5 business days depending on the method chosen.
help.faq_cancel_order_q: Can I cancel an order in progress?
help.faq_cancel_order_a: Yes, under certain conditions. If the freelancer hasn't started the work yet, cancellation is automatic with a full refund. If work is in progress, a cancellation request is submitted and both parties must reach an agreement. In case of disagreement, a dispute can be opened.
help.faq_2fa_q: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA)?
help.faq_2fa_a: Go to Settings > Security in your dashboard. Enable 2FA and choose between Google Authenticator (TOTP app) or SMS code. Scan the QR code with your authentication app or enter your phone number. Confirm with the verification code.
help.faq_agency_q: How does the agency system work?
help.faq_agency_a: Agencies have a dedicated space to manage a team of freelancers. As an agency, you can invite members, publish services under your brand, manage multi-member projects with Kanban view, and centralize billing. The Empire plan (65 EUR/month) allows up to 25 members and offers 100 GB of shared storage with 0% commission.
help.faq_contact_support_q: How do I contact Novakou support?
help.faq_contact_support_a: You can contact us in several ways: via live chat available on this page (Monday to Friday, 9am-6pm CET), by email at support@novakou.com, or by creating a support ticket from the form below. Our team commits to responding within 24 hours.
help.faq_kyc_q: What is KYC and why is it necessary?
help.faq_kyc_a: KYC (Know Your Customer) is a mandatory identity verification process for certain actions. Level 1 (email) gives basic access. Level 2 (phone) allows ordering and applying. Level 3 (identity document) unlocks withdrawals and service publishing. Level 4 (professional verification) gives access to the Elite badge and higher limits.
help.faq_boost_q: How do I boost the visibility of my services?
help.faq_boost_a: Several strategies are available: complete your profile to 100%, get positive reviews, use relevant keywords in your titles and descriptions, add quality images to your services, and use the advertising boosts included in Pro, Business and Agency plans to appear at the top of search results.
help.support_desc: Create a support ticket and our team will respond within 24 hours. You can also contact us by email at
help.ticket_error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
help.ticket_success: Your ticket has been created successfully. We will respond within 24h.
help.chat_welcome: Hello! How can I help you?
help.chat_auto_reply: Thank you for your message. A member of our team will respond as soon as possible. In the meantime, check our FAQ above for a quick answer.
